---
name: update-plan-give-prompt
description: "Updates plans and memories related to the current conversation, and gives users a prompt to carry out the next phase of the plan in a new chat session without losing any context."
---

# Workflow

1. Update the plan and memories related to the current conversation based on the latest information.
2. Generate a prompt that summarizes the next steps of the plan and encourages the user to start a new chat session to continue the conversation without losing any context.
